log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: Standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night is a moment of profound isolation and awe. The darkness stretches endlessly, enveloping you in its mystery; yet, the horizon holds an allure that beckons you to explore further into this uncharted territory. The stars above seem to pulse with life, each twinkling like distant eyes watching over your solitude. The wind whispers secrets through the leaves, carrying memories of other shores and oceans, reminding you that even when alone, there are vast worlds waiting just beyond what can be seen in the dark sea of your own thoughts.
